message:
fix: add t.Cleanup to drop scheduler test databases after each run

setupSchedulerIntegrationTown creates beads_h<N> and beads_r<N> databases
via bd init but never dropped them. Added t.Cleanup() that drops both
databases after each test to prevent orphaned databases on the Dolt server.

Fixes: gt-56o (partial — rig_integration_test.go already uses mock bd)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
